narrative:
06 congressional district has 489,480 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.4 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.1% D−R vs +4.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
